KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_1_Payout1_1: At every spin, any combinations of 4 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_2_Payout1_2: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_3_Payout1_3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the Paytable multiplied by the bet size and bet multiplier.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_4_Payout1_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_5_Payout1_5: Wild Kraken symbols and Scatter symbols will occupy 2 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_6_Payout1_6: Wild Kraken symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, a Wild Kraken symbol occupies the third row of reel 3 and 4 and will remain on the reels throughout any spin.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any main game spin with 3 or more winning rounds, when there are no more winning combinations, the total win of the main game spin will be multiplied by x5 before wins are paid.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the multiplier wheel is set at x5.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: The multiplier wheel consists of x5, x10, x15, x20, x25, x30, x35, x40, x45, x50, x60, x70, x80, x90 and x100.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_4: During any free spin, every 3 winning rounds will increase the multiplier by one level on the multiplier wheel.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_5_Payout4_5: At the end of any free spin, when there are no more winning combinations, the total win of the free spin will be multiplied by the multiplier shown on the multiplier wheel.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_1_Payout5_1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
KrakenGoldRushPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule5_2_Payout5_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

KrakenGoldRushRule.Rule1_1: Kraken Gold Rush is a 6 by 5 symbols combination video slot featuring a sticky Wild Kraken symbol and multipliers up to x100.
KrakenGoldRushRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
KrakenGoldRushRule.Rule1_13: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
KrakenGoldRushRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
